story.text:
# 🌙 The Poems

Selene's Spellbook — the privacymage grimoire as verse, in **book order** (the 129-page poetry volume): two movements, a divergent tale, and the door to the City of Mages. The nine poems marked 🔮 carry their **ornament glyph**, in the engraving hand.

- [[Poem — Movement One — The Amnesia Protocol]]
- [[Poem — I. The Emissary Who Forgot the Master]] 🔮
- [[Poem — II. The Amnesia Protocol]] 🔮
- [[Poem — III. The Tide Proves. Orbit Keeps. Selene.]] 🔮
- [[Poem — IV. Selene Keeps the Night]] 🔮
- [[Poem — Movement Two — The Wider Weave]]
- [[Poem — V. The Overlap]] 🔮
- [[Poem — VI. The Field He Planted]] 🔮
- [[Poem — VII. The Cartographer's Daughter]] 🔮
- [[Poem — The Divergent Tale]]
- [[Poem — · The Last Premine]] 🔮
- [[Poem — The City of Mages]]
- [[Poem — · The City of Mages]] 🔮
- [[Poem — Envoi]]
